response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience (Dunnhumby's millions-of-requests infrastructure) and excellent software craftsmanship practices, the resume critically lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming—only showing ~6 months at National Instruments. Additionally, there is no explicit technical leadership or mentoring role, and cloud architecture experience is limited to AWS CDK exposure. The current 7-month career gap is also a concern.
strengths: Proven distributed systems experience with high-throughput infrastructure handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby
Strong testing culture and software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and code quality standards across multiple roles
Diverse technical background across languages and platforms, demonstrating architectural thinking and design capability
concerns: Critically low C++ experience (~6 months at National Instruments) against the required 8 years minimum qualification
No formal technical leadership or mentoring role in job titles despite preference for 2+ years in such position
Limited production cloud architecture experience beyond AWS CDK, with no evidence of cloud platform strategy or DevOps engineering mentorship
